projects.title: Freshwater Conservation Canada Analysis
projects.description: Designed an interactive Power BI dashboard summarising multi-year ecological monitoring data for Freshwater Conservation Canada at Elk Creek, allowing stakeholders to filter by species, year, and survey location.

projects.title: Saddle Lake Solar Farm
projects.description: A project on a theoretical solar farm at the Saddle Lake reserve in Northern Alberta. Covered ArcGIS Pro fundamentals including vector and raster analysis, DEMs, and a full spatial data workflow.

projects.title: Alberta Invasive Species Council
projects.description: Wrote a report for the Alberta Invasive Species Council on the potentially invasive Siberian Squill and the threat it poses to the native Western Blue Flag Iris.

projects.title: Oh Deer!: An Ethological Study on Local Deer Populations
projects.description: A research project for Animal Behaviour examining local deer feeding habits outside Okotoks, AB and a wild population near Longview, AB.

projects.title: Freshwater Conservation Canada — Public Poster
projects.description: A simplified poster summarising the Elk Creek conservation project for a general audience, emphasising accessibility and readability over technical detail.

projects.title: 2026 Winter Olympics Data Poster
projects.description: A data visualisation poster created for the 2026 Milan-Cortina Winter Olympics, combining graphic design with statistical storytelling.

projects.title: Robot Car
projects.description: Built a robotic car that stops a set distance from a light source using proximity sensors. An early foray into hardware programming and IoT — the robot has since been lost to time.
